title.en: Many of the Eternal Masters are curious.

content.en:
The Daoyin Stone of the Demon Heart Valley, this kind of treasure is very valuable, even the Nine Realms level controller may not be able to exchange it for its treasure.

At this time, many Eternal Masters were curious about what treasures the owner of the Daoyin Stone wanted to trade in this auction.

I saw that Kitano said: "This time I bid for the Daoyin Stone, and I only accept the curse of the Black Stone." "

"Curse Blackstone, what is this going to curse Blackstone?"

Many of the Eternal Masters are curious.

Ye Tian didn't know what the cursed black stone was, but he soon knew.

It turns out that the Cursed Black Stone is a kind of stone in the depths of the Realm, which does not seem to be uncommon, and contains a terrifying curse power, even if the body of a Seven Realms level master touches the cursed black stone, it will be affected by the curse power.

Of course, the power of the curse can be removed.

But so far, only this effect has been found.

Many Nine Realm-level Masters have collected a lot of Cursed Black Stones, which can be used for Lianha curse weapons, or sold to the Eternal Master of the Cursed Path.

However, exchanging Daoyin Stone for Cursed Black Stone is a bit outrageous, the value of the two is not at the same level at all!

"If the other party collects it openly in the Origin Realm Sea, he will definitely be able to exchange ordinary treasures for cursed black stones, but once he buys them in large quantities, it will attract the attention of other eternal masters, and his identity cannot be hidden. And now, if you get a large amount of cursed black stones by auction, you will not reveal your identity, and the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce will also protect the identity of your customers. "

The Snow Maiden Controller roughly guessed why the other party had auctioned off the Cursed Blackstone at the auction.

And the other Eternal Masters have basically guessed it.

However, why the other party did this, there is no guess.

"The owner of the Daoyin Stone, could it be that he has researched other uses for the cursed black stone, and it is very valuable?" Ye Tian guessed.

If this is the case, it is somewhat understandable that the other party exchanged the Daoyin Stone for the Curse Black Stone.

At the same time, the other party was also afraid that others would ask about the situation, so he did not dare to disclose his identity.

But even so, many Eternal Masters are willing to trade the Cursed Blackstone for the Daoyin Stone.

Daoyin Stone is of great value to them, but it can't be done to curse Blackstone!

At the same time, one by one, the Nine Realms-level Masters sent avatars or will clones to collect the Cursed Blackstones, perhaps buying the Cursed Blackstones of other Eternal Masters in order to compete for the Daoyin Stones.

It is conceivable that in the end, the Eternal Master, who has no hope of obtaining the Daoyin Stone, will definitely sell the Daoyin Stone in his hand to other Eternal Master, and the cursed Blackstone will eventually be concentrated on a few people.

In this way, a large number of cursed black stones from the Origin Realm Sea will gather here and be traded away by that mysterious person.

"1,000 cursed blackstones!"

The Snow Maiden Controller bids.

"I'll give you 2,000 cursed black stones!" said another Nine Realm-level master.

One by one, the Nine Realm-level controllers kept quoting, and as for those Eight Realm-level controllers, even if they often went to the end of the realm, it was estimated that they couldn't find many cursed black stones, so they didn't make an offer, but instead contacted a Nine Realm-level controllers and secretly sold the cursed black stones to them.

Selling Cursed Blackstone at this time will inevitably sell it for a high price.

Such an opportunity is only now, and when the auction is over, the cursed blackstone will not be so valuable.

Soon, the auction price of the Daoyin Stone climbed to tens of thousands of cursed black stones, but there was still no sign of stopping.

Twenty thousand!

Thirty thousand!

Fifty thousand!

Before I knew it, the bidding price for 100,000 cursed black stones came out.

At this time, there were not many Nine Realms-level controllers who were still bidding, and even the Snow Maiden controllers had given up.

The Snow Maiden doesn't have many cursed blackstones in the first place, and she's really poor now, and she doesn't have many treasures to trade for cursed blackstones, so there's no way to collect cursed blackstones to compete for auctions.

So, she had no choice but to give up.

"Two hundred and fifty thousand cursed black stones!"

The Nine Realms level controller of the Heavenly Realm said.

The offer of the Heaven Commander directly made the remaining three Nine Realm-level Masters give up.

At this time, these three Nine Realm-level controllers were secretly discussing.

"The cursed blackstones of the three of us together can surpass the cursed blackstones of the master of the heavens, how about I buy your cursed blackstones?"

"Hehe, why didn't I buy your cursed blackstone?"

"In this way, the three of us will make our own bids, and whoever has the highest price will buy it, how about it?"

"Yes, so be it!"

These three Nine Realm-level Masters quickly offered their bids one by one, and after some competition, the Eternal Night Masters finally acquired the Cursed Blackstone of the other two Nine Realm-level Masters.

At this time, the Eternal Night Controller, the Eternal Night, cursed the Black Stone 350,000!

"I'll curse the black stone with 280,000!"

The Master of the Eternal Night offered.

"Two hundred and ninety,000 cursed black stones!" said the Celestial Master, gritting his teeth.

This is the cursed blackstone he has collected all, and it is already the limit.

"Three hundred thousand cursed blackstone!" said the Master of the Eternal Night.

"Damn it!"

The Celestial Ruler was furious.

Immediately, he contacted the two Eternal Masters who had just competed with him to acquire their Cursed Blackstone.

"I'm sorry, Celestial Master, our cursed Blackstone has been given to the Eternal Night Controller, if you buy it sooner, we may be able to give it to you!" the two responded.

Hearing this news, the Sky Masters were extremely desperate.

Right now, he can't collect the Cursed Blackstone.

The point is, the Daoyin Stone didn't get the bidding, what use did he want these cursed black stones, and in order to buy so many cursed black stones, he paid a great price, and this time it was a big loss!

"Celestial Master, it seems that you don't have any more cursed blackstones, so I'm the one who has the last laugh this time!" said the Eternal Night Ruler excitedly.

"Humph!"

The Celestial Commander snorted coldly and didn't say anything.

In this way, the controller of Kitano announced that the auction was successful, and it was the master of the eternal night.

At this point, the auction is completely over.

For this auction, Ye Tian has seen a lot of good things and seen a lot of good things.

However, he did not bid on any treasures, because he could not afford to bid.

The only thing that values the three statues of Wanxiang, the other party does not exchange treasures, just to save lives.

"It seems that we have to start with the master of the Xuantu, and we must solve his physical problems before he will give me the three statues of Ten Thousand Phases!" Ye Tian thought to himself.

After returning from the headquarters of the Jiehe Chamber of Commerce, Ye Tian decided to copy the body of the master of the Xuantu first, and then slowly study it himself.

The body of the master of Xuantu only has one life, and he doesn't dare to test it randomly.

But Ye Tian is not afraid, his copy body has fallen, it doesn't matter, just pay some resource costs, he can copy it again and again.

If he can solve the physical problems of the master of the Xuantu, he can obtain three more statues of ten thousand phases.

He naturally wants to do such a deal.

"Then start copying!"

Ye Tian muttered.
